name: Beer Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
2. Mix flour, salt, and baking powder in a bowl.
3. Combine the dry ingredients with beer and honey in a large bowl until well mixed.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a wooden pick comes out clean when inserted into the center.
6. Turn the bread out onto a cooling rack to cool completely before slicing.
